title: Rangers hope World Cup cash will pay for better VAR
summary: Rangers believes Scotland's World Cup earnings could fund improvements to VAR systems and officiating standards in Scottish domestic football. This reflects growing concerns about video assistant referee quality in league play.
content: Rangers hope money being made by Scotland at the World Cup can go towards improving video assistant referees (VAR), and officiating standards in general, in the domestic game.

zh.title: 流浪者队希望世界杯资金用于改进VAR系统
zh.summary: 流浪者队认为苏格兰世界杯收入可以资助改进苏格兰国内足球的VAR系统和裁判标准。这反映了人们对英超联赛视频助理裁判质量日益增长的担忧。

title: World Cup quiz: Name every player in Scotland's squad
summary: Scotland prepares for their first World Cup match since 1998, facing Haiti on June 14, with a 26-player squad selected by manager Steve Clarke. This article tests readers' knowledge of the squad composition.
content: Scotland face Haiti on 14 June in their first World Cup match since 1998 - but can you name all 26 players in Steve Clarke's squad?

title: Gabby Logan on her final moments with football legend dad Terry Yorath
summary: Football presenter Gabby Logan reflects on her final moments with her father, legendary footballer Terry Yorath, including reading a touching fan email to him on his final day.
content: Gabby Logan says she read a heartfelt email from a fan to her dad the day he died.

title: Could history be rewritten? Guardiola, Man City and the 115 charges
summary: As Pep Guardiola prepares to depart Manchester City, the club's 115 alleged Premier League financial rule breaches threaten to overshadow his legacy. The outcome could significantly reshape how his tenure is historically assessed.
content: With Pep Guardiola expected to leave Manchester City at the end of this season, how do the club's 115 Premier League charges for alleged financial rule breaches potentially affect his legacy at Etihad Stadium?

title: 'Big game scorer' Stewart and Curtis make Scotland World Cup squad
summary: Ross Stewart and Findlay Curtis have been selected for Scotland's World Cup squad, though Lennon Miller was notably left out of the final 26-player selection.
content: Ross Stewart and Findlay Curtis are named in Scotland's World Cup squad but there is no place for Lennon Miller.

summary: Enzo Maresca is poised to become Manchester City's next manager, succeeding Pep Guardiola ahead of the upcoming season.

title: Focus on errors can 'tarnish' goalkeepers - Hampton
summary: England goalkeeper Hannah Hampton argues that media coverage focusing on goalkeeper errors unfairly damages the reputation of female goalkeepers, overlooking their positive contributions.
content: England's Hannah Hampton says media can "tarnish the reputation" of female goalkeepers by focusing on mistakes and not their positive displays.

content: If Tottenham survive at Stamford Bridge, away to Chelsea, it would be seen by many supporters as an unforgivable outcome for those involved.

title: Five reasons why Best was a genius
summary: George Best would have turned 80 on May 22, and the article celebrates his legendary career by highlighting five of his most memorable goals. His exceptional talent secured his place in football history.
content: George Best would have been 80 on 22 May. Take a look back on an unforgettable career and enjoy five of his most memorable goals.

zh.title: 贝斯特为什么是天才的五个原因

title: Non-league midfielder doubles up as club CEO
summary: Michael Clunan, a midfielder at King's Lynn Town FC, has temporarily taken on the additional role of club chief executive officer.
content: Midfielder Michael Clunan is taking on the role temporarily, King's Lynn Town FC says.

title: D-Day in Spygate case: What's at stake and what could happen?
summary: Southampton faces a disciplinary hearing that could cost them their playoff final berth after being charged with improperly observing a Middlesbrough training session. The verdict is expected Tuesday, representing a critical moment for the club's season.
content: Southampton's place in the play-off final is at stake as they face a disciplinary hearing as they stand charged of watching a Middlesbrough training session. The result is expected to come on Tuesday.

zh.title: 间谍门案件中的D日：利害关系和可能发生的情况？
zh.summary: 南安普顿因被控不当观察米德尔斯堡训练课而面临纪律听证会，这可能使他们失去季后赛决赛席位。判决预计在周二做出，代表了俱乐部赛季的关键时刻。

title: Did England 'fake relationships' cost team 2006 World Cup glory?
summary: Former England players and coaching staff examine whether tensions from Premier League rivalries between teammates undermined the so-called Golden Generation's 2006 World Cup campaign. The discussion reflects on how club-level competition may have fractured international team cohesion.
content: Former England players and coaching staff reflect on whether intense Premier League rivalries may have undermined the so-called Golden Generation at the 2006 World Cup.

zh.title: 英格兰虚伪的关系是否导致2006年世界杯失利?
